verse.name: v1
verse.lines: God is so good, God is so good, God is so good, He's so good to me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: He saved my sin-sick soul, He set my spirit free, He healed my broken heart, He's so good to me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I love Him so, I love Him so, I love Him so, He's so good to me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He answers prayer, He answers prayer, He answers prayer, He's so good to me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: He's coming soon, He's coming soon, He's coming soon, He's so good to me.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh, God is good, Oh, God is good, Oh, God is good, He's so good to me.
